name: who_2024_diabetes_diagnosis_workflow
description: Determine if a patient has diabetes based on the WHO 2024 diagnostic criteria.

inputs.input_desc: Whether the patient has typical diabetes symptoms (yes/no).
The plasma glucose level in mmol/L.
The fasting plasma glucose level in mmol/L.
The 2-hour glucose level after an OGTT in mmol/L.
The hemoglobin A1c level in percentage.

steps.step_description: Check if the patient has typical diabetes symptoms and a plasma glucose level of ≥ 11.1 mmol/L at any time.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether the patient has typical diabetes symptoms (yes/no).
The plasma glucose level in mmol/L.

step_outputs.output_desc: Result indicating whether this criterion is met (true/false).

steps.reason: This step checks for the presence of typical diabetes symptoms and a high plasma glucose level.
steps.detail: If the patient has typical diabetes symptoms and their plasma glucose level is ≥ 11.1 mmol/L, then this condition is satisfied.

steps.step_description: Check if the fasting plasma glucose (FPG) level is ≥ 7.0 mmol/L with an empty stomach for at least 8 hours.

step_inputs.input_desc: The fasting plasma glucose level in mmol/L.

step_outputs.output_desc: Result indicating whether this criterion is met (true/false).

steps.reason: This step evaluates the fasting plasma glucose level to determine if it meets the diagnostic criteria.
steps.detail: If the fasting plasma glucose level is ≥ 7.0 mmol/L, then this condition is satisfied.

steps.step_description: Check if the 2-hour oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) glucose level is ≥ 11.1 mmol/L.

step_inputs.input_desc: The 2-hour glucose level after an OGTT in mmol/L.

step_outputs.output_desc: Result indicating whether this criterion is met (true/false).

steps.reason: This step evaluates the 2-hour glucose level after an OGTT to determine if it meets the diagnostic criteria.
steps.detail: If the 2-hour glucose level after an OGTT is ≥ 11.1 mmol/L, then this condition is satisfied.

steps.step_description: Check if the hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level is ≥ 6.5%.

step_inputs.input_desc: The hemoglobin A1c level in percentage.

step_outputs.output_desc: Result indicating whether this criterion is met (true/false).

steps.reason: This step evaluates the HbA1c level to determine if it meets the diagnostic criteria.
steps.detail: If the HbA1c level is ≥ 6.5%, then this condition is satisfied.

steps.step_description: Determine if the patient meets the WHO 2024 diabetes diagnostic criteria based on the results from previous steps.

step_inputs.input_desc: Result from the first criterion check (typical symptoms + plasma glucose ≥ 11.1 mmol/L).
Result from the second criterion check (fasting plasma glucose ≥ 7.0 mmol/L).
Result from the third criterion check (OGTT 2-hour glucose ≥ 11.1 mmol/L).
Result from the fourth criterion check (HbA1c ≥ 6.5%).

step_outputs.output_desc: Final diagnosis result indicating whether the patient has diabetes (1 for yes, 0 for no).

steps.reason: This step combines the results from all four diagnostic criteria using logical OR to determine if the patient meets the WHO 2024 diabetes diagnostic criteria.
steps.detail: If any of the four conditions are met, the patient is diagnosed with diabetes. If not, they are not diagnosed with diabetes.

output.output_desc: Final diagnosis result indicating whether the patient has diabetes (1 for yes, 0 for no).

code:
def solve(has_typical_symptoms, plasma_glucose_mmol_l, fasting_plasma_glucose_mmol_l, ogtt_2hour_glucose_mmol_l, hbA1c_percent):
    # Step 1: Check if the patient has typical diabetes symptoms and a plasma glucose level of ≥ 11.1 mmol/L at any time
    symptoms_and_plasma_glucose_result = (has_typical_symptoms == "yes") and (plasma_glucose_mmol_l >= 11.1)
    
    yield {
        "step_name": "symptoms_and_plasma_glucose_check",
        "step_description": "Check if the patient has typical diabetes symptoms and a plasma glucose level of ≥ 11.1 mmol/L at any time.",
        "step_result": symptoms_and_plasma_glucose_result,
        "unit": None
    }

    # Step 2: Check if the fasting plasma glucose (FPG) level is ≥ 7.0 mmol/L with an empty stomach for at least 8 hours
    fasting_plasma_glucose_result = (fasting_plasma_glucose_mmol_l >= 7.0)
    
    yield {
        "step_name": "fasting_plasma_glucose_check",
        "step_description": "Check if the fasting plasma glucose (FPG) level is ≥ 7.0 mmol/L with an empty stomach for at least 8 hours.",
        "step_result": fasting_plasma_glucose_result,
        "unit": None
    }

    # Step 3: Check if the 2-hour oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) glucose level is ≥ 11.1 mmol/L
    ogtt_result = (ogtt_2hour_glucose_mmol_l >= 11.1)
    
    yield {
        "step_name": "ogtt_2hour_glucose_check",
        "step_description": "Check if the 2-hour oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) glucose level is ≥ 11.1 mmol/L.",
        "step_result": ogtt_result,
        "unit": None
    }

    # Step 4: Check if the hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level is ≥ 6.5%
    hbA1c_result = (hbA1c_percent >= 6.5)
    
    yield {
        "step_name": "hbA1c_check",
        "step_description": "Check if the hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level is ≥ 6.5%.",
        "step_result": hbA1c_result,
        "unit": None
    }

    # Step 5: Determine if the patient meets the WHO 2024 diabetes diagnostic criteria based on the results from previous steps
    diabetes_diagnosis = 1 if (symptoms_and_plasma_glucose_result or fasting_plasma_glucose_result or ogtt_result or hbA1c_result) else 0
    
    yield {
        "step_name": "diabetes_diagnosis_check",
        "step_description": "Determine if the patient meets the WHO 2024 diabetes diagnostic criteria based on the results from previous steps.",
        "step_result": diabetes_diagnosis,
        "unit": None
    }

    return diabetes_diagnosis
